title: medicago suffruticosa subsp. suffruticosa
intro: Medicago suffruticosa subsp. suffruticosa, also known as the little burning clover or small burn clover, is a subspecies of perennial legume native to Europe and Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Medicago suffruticosa subsp. suffruticosa include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. The herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used to treat various health conditions, such as skin irritations, wounds, and colds.
